label: Smartlead
description: Connect to Smartlead to manage cold email campaigns, mailboxes, and deliverability from Anton.

form.title: Connect Smartlead
form.subtitle: Paste your Smartlead API key to give Anton access to your campaigns and mailboxes.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your Smartlead API key from Settings → API. Quickest path — no OAuth setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with an API Key

Smartlead exposes all of its platform features via a REST API authenticated with a single API key tied to your account.

### Steps

1. Log in to [Smartlead](https://app.smartlead.ai).
2. Click your avatar or workspace name in the bottom-left corner, then go to **Settings**.
3. Select the **API** tab (sometimes listed as **API Key** or **Integrations**).
4. Your API key is displayed on that page. Click **Copy** (or reveal and copy manually).
5. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below and click **Submit**.

### Notes

- The API key grants full account access — treat it like a password and do not share it publicly.
- If you regenerate the key in Smartlead's Settings, come back here and update the stored value; the old key will stop working immediately.
- API keys are scoped to the workspace you are logged in to. If you manage multiple workspaces, repeat this process for each one.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in Smartlead → Settings → API. Treat this like a password — it grants full account access.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: API Base URL
fields.description: Leave as default unless Smartlead has assigned you a custom API endpoint.
